claim_bullets.bullet_text: All of the examples in this book were tested using either Google Traceur Compiler 100 , Babel 101 , or both. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.289-290)
Both tools offer an online area where you can type ECMAScript code into a web browser and see the ECMAScript-5 equivalent, and you can run the code as well. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.289-290)

source_record_text: How to run the examples from JavaScript Allongé, including use of Traceur Compiler and Babel transpilers.
